name: Send the morning scorecard now
description: On-demand version of the 6 AM morning brief — sends the live YT/Gumroad/KDP/campaign/budget scorecard to Jed's Telegram.
prompt_template: Call buildMorningScorecard() from scheduler.js, then bot.sendMessage(OWNER_ID, scorecard, parse_mode: Markdown). No additional commentary.
notes: Equivalent to /brief slash command. Useful for natural-language phrasings.
